# orders

Main order record. One row per checkout attempt that reached the payment step.

Joined frequently with `users.id` and `order_items.order_id`.

## Gotchas

- `status` transitions are enforced at the application layer; the DB has no CHECK constraint.
- `total_cents` is the pre-discount total; see `order_discounts` for applied promos.
